title: Fever Mounts at El Pao
writer: Henri Castillou, Luis Buñuel, Luis Alcoriza
actors: Gérard Philipe, María Félix, Jean Servais
plot: Aroused citizens assassinate an unpopular Caribbean despot, then two men vie for his gorgeous widow Ines. Ojeda is a steamy, isolated island, the penal colony for an oppressive dictatorship. A reactionary seizes the murdered gover...
